import yaml
import sys
sys.path.append\('model'\)
from utils import check_config

with open\('config/params.yml', 'r'\) as stream:
    config = yaml.load\(stream, yaml.FullLoader\)

print\('=== Before check_config ==='\)
print\(f\\"task.dim: {config['task']['dim']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"task.idx: {config['task']['idx']}\\"\)

config = check_config\(config\)

print\('\\\\n=== After check_config ==='\)
print\(f\\"q_net_params.in_features: {config['q_net_params']['in_features']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"u_net_params.in_features: {config['u_net_params']['in_features']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"scheduler_params.total_steps: {config['scheduler_params']['total_steps']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"train_params.results_path: {config['train_params']['results_path']}\\"\)
print\('\\\\nConfig check passed!'\)
